title: Add `-fno-inline-funcs-eager` option to disable excessive inlining
body:
Historically we always used to depend on inlining of all verilog functions and tasks, which was required for various reasons (especially scheduling, which does not look into function calls to see dependencies). Today we can emit pure functions non-inlined, but the default is still to inline everything, which can blow up the code quite a lot.

This patch adds a new option to not inline those functions by default that are safe not to (pure SV `function`s defined by the user). 

The default behaviour is still the same (inline everything), but at some point we some point we should be able to make a more intelligent decision on what to inline of the functions that are safe not to inline.


Note I will revert the change to the RTLMeter jobs before landing.
